data.description: you attack once, but instead of at level, can twice,
You can move as a bonus action.
You embrace the raw, untamed power of nature, learning to survive in the wilds and drawing strength from your primal instincts.
You have a knack for dealing devastating blows in close combat.
Beginning 18th level, if your Strength check is less than your Strength score, you can place the result on a grid square that has an ally within 5 feet.
At levei 20th you Strength Constitution scores and maximum those scores now is 24.
